questions.question: Does isImageUrl correctly identify HTTPS image URLs by extension and blossom blob pattern, rejecting non-HTTPS and non-image URLs?
questions.actionable_check: Read isImageUrl in linkify.ts and run linkify.test.ts isImageUrl tests.
questions.pass_criteria: 8 image extensions recognized, blob URLs detected, non-HTTPS rejected

questions.question: Does MessageContent render image URLs as CachedImage components with lightbox, while rendering non-image URLs as text links?
questions.actionable_check: Read MessageContent in main.tsx. Verify it checks isImageUrl for link segments and renders CachedImage vs text link accordingly.
evidence_required: Source code of MessageContent rendering logic
questions.pass_criteria: Image URLs render as CachedImage with click-to-expand; non-image URLs render as blue text links

questions.question: Does MessageContent skip inline image rendering when hasMediaJson is true (no double-rendering)?
questions.actionable_check: Read the isImageUrl check in MessageContent. Verify it's gated by !hasMediaJson.
questions.pass_criteria: Image URLs only render inline when hasMediaJson is false/undefined

questions.question: Is hasMediaJson correctly passed from MessageBubble to MessageContent based on message.mediaJson?
questions.actionable_check: Read the MessageContent invocation in MessageBubble.
evidence_required: Source code of MessageContent call with hasMediaJson prop

mandatory_questions.question: Do all existing tests pass without regressions?
